title: pyrrosia gralla
intro: Pyrrosia gralla, also known as the Chinese kidneywort, is a species of plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pyrrosia gralla include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pyrrosia gralla can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
